title: Dashboard Page
content:
## Dashboard Page (`app/dashboard/page.tsx`) This file defines the main dashboard page for the DocMed application. It serves as the landing page after a user logs in or navigates to the dashboard route. ### Purpose The primary purpose of this page is to provide a welcoming interface for users to start interacting with their documentation workspace. It displays a brief welcome message and an encouraging prompt to begin improving their documentation. ### Key Components and Exports * **`DashboardPage` Function Component:** This is the main export of the file, a React functional component that renders the dashboard UI. ### Usage Example This component is typically rendered automatically when a user navigates to the `/dashboard` route of the application. No explicit import or usage within other components is generally required for its primary function. ```typescript // This component is rendered by the Next.js routing system at /dashboard export default function DashboardPage() { return (

Dashboard

Welcome to DocMed. Your AI-powered documentation workspace.

D

Your workspace is ready. Start healing your docs.

); } ```
